steps.t: One of the guards within the Citadel of Winds thinks to bar your passage to the chamber where meet the Kindred of the Coins.
Your husband Tumúldo meets with the other members of the Kindred of the Coins within the Citadel of Winds.
Azagath desires to speak with you and Tumúldo about a secret matter.
There was something you wanted to tell your husband, but now you cannot remember what it could have been.
Whatever Nakási may have experienced during her final moments, you hope she is now at peace.
Tatháta stands upon the deck of Tumuldo-râba, Nakási's flagship.
